description: Canonical Claude OS playbooks: human- and agent-executable runbooks with explicit risk, approvals, and evidence.

playbooks.name: Release
playbooks.summary: Ship a release candidate with strict validation, manifests, drift checks, and documented residual risk.

playbooks.name: Incident response
playbooks.summary: Stabilize production during incidents with minimal scope, approvals, evidence, and rollback.

playbooks.name: Data or platform migration
playbooks.summary: Plan and execute migrations with blast-radius control, rehearsal, and validation gates.

playbooks.name: Bootstrap project
playbooks.summary: Scaffold a new project tree from Claude OS templates with deterministic validation.

playbooks.name: Documentation contract audit
playbooks.summary: Align README, manifests, schemas, and validators without false-green language.

playbooks.name: Autonomous repair (bounded)
playbooks.summary: Validation-first bounded repair with rollback/diff discipline; escalate to steward approvals on risk transitions.

playbooks.name: Adapter drift repair
playbooks.summary: Detect and repair drift between canonical sources and generated adapter copies using manifest-driven sync.
